title: Half a Sixpence
writer: Beverley Cross, Dorothy Kingsley, H.G. Wells
actors: Tommy Steele, Julia Foster, Cyril Ritchard
plot: Arthur Kipps, an orphan apprenticed to a tyrannical owner of a mercantile, has a sudden abrupt change of life when his wealthy grandfather dies and leaves him a pile of money.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award2 nominations total
